elements.original_description: A person sitting on a couch, holding a credit card in one hand and a shopping bag in the other, with a stressed expression on their face. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a person sitting on a modern couch, holding a credit card in one hand and a shopping bag in the other, with a stressed and anxious expression on their face. Cinematic lighting with soft bokeh background, sharp focus on the person's face and hands, high resolution, realistic textures, no text or letters.

elements.original_description: A shopping cart overflowing with various items like clothes, electronics, and groceries, with a price tag floating above it. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
